div.h1: Intel-Grade Technical Specification: Ring Buffer Consumer
div.p: Target Latency: < 100ns | Concurrency: MPMC / SPSC Compatible

ul.li: Instruction Count: ~12 instructions in hot-path (Optimized O2/O3).
Branch Prediction: tail == head is highly predictable (rarely empty).
Prevents False Sharing between producer and consumer cores.
x86: acquire is a no-op at CPU level (TSO), but prevents compiler reordering.

// ACQUIRE ensures all data writes by producer
// prior to head update are visible to this core.

g.text: ⚠️ CPU Memory Barrier: LoadLoad + LoadStore (Acquire Semantics)
